items.title: File Upload Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: A critical file upload vulnerability (CVSS score: 9.6) in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source could lead to privilege escalation.

items.title: Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: An improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability (CVSS score: 9.1) in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source could lead to arbitrary code execution.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This regularly scheduled security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability (CVSS score: 9.8) in the Mirasvit Cache Warmer extension for Magento and Adobe Commerce allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie and is actively exploited.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files by disguising code as an image, bypassing validation. Adobe released a fix in Magento 2.4.9.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, and compromise customer accounts.
